title: alopecurus alpinus var. stejnegeri
intro: Alopecurus alpinus var. stejnegeri, also known as Stejneger's foxtail grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stejneger's foxtail grass include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, or made into tinctures and capsules for its medicinal properties.
